name: BillcomConnector
description: Connects to the Bill.com REST API (v2) to manage vendors, customers, bills, invoices, payments, the chart of accounts, classifications, and locations. Uses session-based authentication seeded by a 4-piece credential bundle (userName + password + orgId + devKey) and transparently re-logs-in when Bill.com rejects a stale sessionId.

install_fields.label: Bill.com Username (Email)
install_fields.help: Bill.com login email. Sent as the userName form field on POST /Login.json.

install_fields.label: Bill.com Password
install_fields.help: Stored encrypted. Used only by the connector to obtain a sessionId via POST /Login.json.

install_fields.label: Bill.com Organization ID
install_fields.help: Found in Bill.com → Settings → Profile → Organization ID. Sent as the orgId form field on POST /Login.json.

install_fields.label: Bill.com Developer Key
install_fields.help: Apply at developer.bill.com. Sent as the devKey form field on every API call.

install_fields.label: Bill.com API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Bill.com REST API. Leave blank to use the default. Override for sandbox or proxy.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap on requests per minute. Default 60 — Bill.com's standard quota.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the 4-piece credential bundle and performs an initial /Login.json call. Saves config + cached sessionId.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: No-op for Bill.com (session-based auth). Returns a TokenInfo wrapping the cached sessionId.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Bill.com connectivity by forcing a fresh /Login.json round-trip.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Lists + normalizes vendors, bills, customers, and invoices into the Shielva KB.

apis.name: Login
apis.description: Force-refresh the Bill.com session and return the new sessionId.

apis.name: Logout
apis.description: Invalidate the current sessionId on the Bill.com side.

apis.name: List Vendors
apis.description: POST /List/Vendor.json — paginate vendors. Optional filters list of Bill.com filter dicts.

apis.name: Get Vendor
apis.description: POST /Crud/Read/Vendor.json — read a single vendor by its Bill.com ID.

apis.name: Create Vendor
apis.description: POST /Crud/Create/Vendor.json — create a vendor record.

apis.name: List Bills
apis.description: POST /List/Bill.json — paginate bills (accounts payable).

apis.name: Get Bill
apis.description: POST /Crud/Read/Bill.json — read a single bill by ID.

apis.name: Create Bill
apis.description: POST /Crud/Create/Bill.json — create a bill (payable) with one or more line items.

apis.name: Pay Bill
apis.description: POST /SendPayment.json — schedule a payment for a specific bill.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: POST /List/Customer.json — paginate customers.

apis.name: Get Customer
apis.description: POST /Crud/Read/Customer.json — read a single customer by ID.

apis.name: Create Customer
apis.description: POST /Crud/Create/Customer.json — create a customer record.

apis.name: List Invoices
apis.description: POST /List/Invoice.json — paginate invoices (accounts receivable).

apis.name: Get Invoice
apis.description: POST /Crud/Read/Invoice.json — read a single invoice by ID.

apis.name: Create Invoice
apis.description: POST /Crud/Create/Invoice.json — create an invoice (receivable) with one or more line items.

apis.name: List Payments
apis.description: POST /List/SentPay.json — paginate sent payments.

apis.name: Get Payment
apis.description: POST /Crud/Read/SentPay.json — read a single sent payment by ID.

apis.name: List Chart of Accounts
apis.description: POST /List/ChartOfAccount.json — list the organization's ledger accounts.

apis.name: List Classifications
apis.description: POST /List/ActgClass.json — list accounting classifications.

apis.name: List Locations
apis.description: POST /List/Location.json — list entity locations.
